description_long: This is a sealed retail package of Faragello Frozen Broad Beans, presented in a flexible plastic bag. The front of the package features a vibrant image of green broad beans, with the brand name 'Faragello' in bold red and white at the top, and product information in both English and Arabic below. The back of the package displays nutritional facts, ingredients, and multilingual product details, along with a smaller Faragello logo. The sides of the bag are narrow, showing the thickness of the package and some partial graphics of beans and pods. The overall appearance is clean, with a predominantly white background accented by green and red elements. The packaging is typical for frozen food products, designed to be both protective and visually appealing for retail environments.
description: A sealed white plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Broad Beans, featuring vivid images of green beans and bold red branding. The package includes nutritional and product information on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Faragello logo, product name in English and Arabic, and a large image of green broad beans.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the bag, with partial graphics of beans and some text visible.
description_view_2: Back view featuring nutritional facts, multilingual product details, and a smaller Faragello logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bag's thickness and partial bean graphics, with some label text visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A red and white 'Faragello' logo with a stylized 'F' above the brand name, located at the top center of the front and smaller on the back.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front shows images of green broad beans and the text 'Frozen Broad Beans', indicating the product is plain broad beans.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories and other nutritional information.
